title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor discusses how AI coding assistants plateau at 40% productivity gain and shares the team's approach to building agentic workflows across the entire SDLC. The company has deployed autonomous agents for bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and PM/EM support, addressing bottlenecks beyond code writing.
